summary: Energetic late‑summer show with strong Bertha opener and memorable Me & My Uncle, captured on a solid audience recording despite some soundboard quirks.
review: The performance is praised for its lively set – especially Phil Lesh’s inventive licks on “Me & My Uncle” and the upbeat “Bertha” opener – and reviewers note an enjoyable late‑summer vibe. The recording is primarily an audience (AUD) capture that most listeners find good, though a few point out occasional soundboard glitches and an over‑processed Oade mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic reviews (4–5★) highlight a great show, while one strongly negative review flags recording issues; overall rating reflects strong musical performance offset by mixed technical impressions.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and lively audience capture praised as “fantastic AUD,” but some listeners mention soundboard problems and an overrated Oade processing that can affect fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly with a high‑energy opening “Bertha,” inventive mid‑set moments like Phil’s solo on “Me & My Uncle,” and a pleasant transition from the New Orleans‑flavored “Stagger Lee” into “Aiko.”

band_member_comments.Phil: Noted for exciting, melodic licks during “Me & My Uncle.”
